title: United States Employer Identification Number Application (Form SS-4)
description: Apply for an Employer Identification Number (EIN), the 9-digit federal tax identifier the IRS assigns to a business entity, using the data model of IRS Form SS-4 (Application for Employer Identification Number). Covers a single-member LLC, sole proprietorship, corporation, partnership, trust, estate, or nonprofit applying for its first EIN. The fastest channel is the IRS EIN online assistant (immediate issuance), available only to applicants whose principal business is in the U.S. or a U.S. territory and whose responsible party has an SSN or ITIN; applicants outside that scope must apply by fax, mail, or (international applicants only) telephone, using this same Form SS-4 field set. It does not submit the application; the live IRS source is always authoritative (see VERIFICATION.md).

verification.verifiedBy: GovSchema Engineering (Standards Engineer — independent second-reviewer pass)
verification.notes: Independent second-reviewer field-by-field comparison (manual-source-review-v1 Procedure steps 2-3) against a fresh extraction of the Form SS-4 (Rev. 12-2025) PDF (all of lines 1-18, the 'Do I Need an EIN?' table, and the Third Party Designee and signature blocks), cross-checked against the 'About Form SS-4' page, the EIN online-application eligibility page, and the Form SS-4 instructions' 'How To Apply' section. One discrepancy found and corrected (principalAddressLine1's label); no other field, type, required flag, validation rule, or sourceRef needed a change. status advances to 'verified'. See VERIFICATION.md.

documents.label: Signature under penalties of perjury
documents.statement: Under penalties of perjury, I declare that I have examined this application, and to the best of my knowledge and belief, it is true, correct, and complete.

fields.name: principalBusinessInUS
fields.label: Is your principal place of business in the U.S. or U.S. territories?
fields.description: Online EIN assistant eligibility gate (not itself a Form SS-4 line item). The online assistant is limited to applicants whose principal place of business is in the U.S. or U.S. territories; if false, apply by fax, mail, or (international applicants only) telephone instead, using this same field set.
fields.sourceRef: IRS EIN online assistant, "Who can use this tool" eligibility list

fields.name: responsiblePartyHasSSNITIN
fields.label: Does the responsible party have a Social Security Number (SSN) or Individual Taxpayer Identification Number (ITIN)?
fields.description: Online EIN assistant eligibility gate (not itself a Form SS-4 line item). The online assistant is limited to responsible parties identified by SSN or ITIN, not an EIN; if false, apply by fax or mail instead. See responsiblePartyTaxId for the actual identifier.
fields.sourceRef: IRS EIN online assistant, "Who can use this tool" eligibility list

fields.name: entityLegalName
fields.label: Legal name of entity (or individual) for whom the EIN is being requested
fields.description: Personal/business identifier; handle as sensitive data. The legal name of the business, trust, estate, or individual applying — e.g. as it appears on the entity's formation document, or an individual's legal name for a sole proprietorship.

fields.name: tradeName
fields.label: Trade name of business (if different from name on line 1)
fields.description: The 'doing business as' (DBA) name, if different from the legal name.

fields.name: careOfName
fields.label: Executor, administrator, trustee, "care of" name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when the applicant entity is an estate or trust and correspondence should be directed to a named executor, administrator, or trustee.

fields.name: mailingAddressLine1
fields.label: Mailing address (room, apt., suite no. and street, or P.O. box)
fields.description: Where the IRS will send the EIN confirmation notice (CP 575) and correspondence. A P.O. box is allowed here, unlike the principal (street) address.

fields.name: mailingAddressCity
fields.label: Mailing address — city
fields.description: If foreign, the instructions give a different city/province/postal-code format; see mailingAddressCountry.

fields.name: mailingAddressState
fields.label: Mailing address — state
fields.description: Two-letter USPS state or territory abbreviation, e.g. CA, NY, TX. Not applicable to a foreign address; see mailingAddressCountry instead.

fields.name: mailingAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Mailing address — ZIP code
fields.description: 5-digit or ZIP+4 U.S. format, e.g. 90210 or 90210-1234. For a foreign address, give the foreign postal code here instead, per the instructions.

fields.name: mailingAddressCountry
fields.label: Mailing address — country (if foreign)
fields.description: Required only when the mailing address is outside the United States; see the Form SS-4 instructions for the foreign address format.

fields.name: principalAddressLine1
fields.label: Street address (if different) (don't enter a P.O. box)
fields.description: The entity's actual physical/principal business location. Cannot be a P.O. box, unlike the mailing address.

fields.name: principalAddressCity
fields.label: Principal address — city
fields.description: Required only when principalAddressLine1 is given.

fields.name: principalAddressState
fields.label: Principal address — state
fields.description: Two-letter USPS state or territory abbreviation. Required only when principalAddressLine1 is a U.S. address.

fields.name: principalAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Principal address — ZIP code
fields.description: Required only when principalAddressLine1 is given.

fields.name: principalBusinessCountyAndState
fields.label: County and state where principal business is located
fields.description: Free-text county name and state, e.g. "Orange County, CA". Not applicable to every reason for applying (e.g. not needed for a banking-purpose-only application); see reasonForApplying.

fields.name: responsiblePartyName
fields.label: Name of responsible party
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The person who ultimately owns or controls the entity, or who exercises ultimate effective control. Per the Form SS-4 instructions, the responsible party must be an individual (a natural person), not an entity, except where the applicant itself is a government entity. Required on every EIN application regardless of reason for applying.

fields.name: responsiblePartyTaxId
fields.label: Responsible party's SSN, ITIN, or EIN
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. 9 digits, no separators. The IRS online EIN assistant additionally requires this to be an SSN or ITIN (not an EIN) and requires the responsible party themselves to be the applicant or their authorized representative.

fields.name: isLLC
fields.label: Is this application for a limited liability company (LLC) (or a foreign equivalent)?
fields.description: Required for most applicants, but not on every path: the Form SS-4 "Do I Need an EIN?" table (page 2) excludes line 8a from the lines to complete for a plan administrator, an estate administrator, or a state/local tax-reporting agency. If true, also give llcMemberCount and llcOrganizedInUS, and see the instructions for the correct entityType box.

fields.name: llcMemberCount
fields.label: Number of LLC members
fields.description: Required only when isLLC is true.

fields.name: llcOrganizedInUS
fields.label: Was the LLC organized in the United States?
fields.description: Required only when isLLC is true.

fields.name: entityType
fields.label: Type of entity
fields.description: Check only one box. If isLLC is true, see the instructions for which box applies to the LLC (an LLC is not itself a box; it is classified as one of these types for tax purposes).

fields.name: entityTypeOtherSpecify
fields.label: If entity type is "other nonprofit organization" or "other", specify
fields.description: Required only when entityType is other_nonprofit_organization or other.

fields.name: entityTypeCorporationFormNumber
fields.label: If entity type is corporation, enter the form number to be filed
fields.description: Required only when entityType is corporation, e.g. 1120 or 1120-S.

fields.name: entityTypeTrustGrantorTin
fields.label: If entity type is trust, TIN of grantor
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required only when entityType is trust.

fields.name: entityTypeEstateDecedentSSN
fields.label: If entity type is estate, SSN of decedent
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required only when entityType is estate.

fields.name: entityTypePlanAdministratorTin
fields.label: If entity type is plan administrator, TIN
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required only when entityType is plan_administrator.

fields.name: groupExemptionNumber
fields.label: Group Exemption Number (GEN), if any
fields.description: Applies only to certain nonprofit/church-affiliated group-ruling entities.

fields.name: incorporationState
fields.label: If a corporation, state where incorporated
fields.description: Two-letter USPS state abbreviation. Required only when entityType is corporation and the corporation was incorporated in the U.S.; use incorporationForeignCountry instead for a foreign incorporation.

fields.name: incorporationForeignCountry
fields.label: If a corporation, foreign country where incorporated
fields.description: Required only when entityType is corporation and the corporation was incorporated outside the U.S.

fields.name: reasonForApplying
fields.label: Reason for applying
fields.description: Check only one box.

fields.name: reasonForApplyingSpecify
fields.label: Reason for applying — specify
fields.description: Required when reasonForApplying is started_new_business (type of business), changed_type_of_organization (new type), created_a_trust (type of trust), created_a_pension_plan (type of plan), banking_purpose (purpose), or other.

fields.name: businessStartDate
fields.label: Date business started or acquired
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD. Not required on every reason-for-applying path (e.g. not needed for a banking-purpose-only application); see the Form SS-4 instructions for line 11.

fields.name: accountingYearClosingMonth
fields.label: Closing month of accounting year
fields.description: The last month of the entity's accounting year (December for a calendar-year filer). Not required on every reason-for-applying path.

fields.name: highestExpectedEmployees
fields.label: Highest number of employees expected in the next 12 months (enter 0 if none)
fields.description: If 0, expectedAgriculturalEmployees, expectedHouseholdEmployees, and expectedOtherEmployees, along with line 14/15, may be left unanswered.

fields.name: expectedAgriculturalEmployees
fields.label: Expected agricultural employees
fields.description: Only completed when highestExpectedEmployees is greater than 0.

fields.name: expectedHouseholdEmployees
fields.label: Expected household employees
fields.description: Only completed when highestExpectedEmployees is greater than 0.

fields.name: expectedOtherEmployees
fields.label: Expected other employees
fields.description: Only completed when highestExpectedEmployees is greater than 0.

fields.name: file944AnnuallyElection
fields.label: Elect to file Form 944 annually instead of Form 941 quarterly
fields.description: Available only if expected employment tax liability is $1,000 or less in a full calendar year (generally, $5,000 or less in total wages, or $6,536 or less in a U.S. territory). If not checked, the entity must file Form 941 quarterly.

fields.name: firstWagesPaidDate
fields.label: First date wages or annuities were paid
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD. If the applicant is a withholding agent, this is instead the date income will first be paid to a nonresident alien. Only applicable when employees are expected (highestExpectedEmployees greater than 0) or the entity is a withholding agent.

fields.name: principalActivity
fields.label: Principal activity of the business
fields.description: Check one box that best describes the principal activity. Not required on every reason-for-applying path.

fields.name: principalActivityOtherSpecify
fields.label: If principal activity is "other", specify
fields.description: Required only when principalActivity is other.

fields.name: principalLineOfBusiness
fields.label: Principal line of merchandise sold, construction work done, products produced, or services provided
fields.description: Free text, e.g. "Residential electrical contracting".

fields.name: previouslyAppliedForEIN
fields.label: Has the applicant entity shown on line 1 ever applied for and received an EIN?
fields.description: A new EIN is generally not issued to the same legal entity twice; see the instructions if unsure whether the entity already has one.

fields.name: previousEIN
fields.label: Previous EIN
fields.description: Required only when previouslyAppliedForEIN is true. Format NN-NNNNNNN.

fields.name: thirdPartyDesigneeName
fields.label: Third party designee's name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Complete this section only to authorize a named individual to receive the entity's EIN and answer questions about this application; the designee's authority terminates once the EIN is assigned and released.
fields.sourceRef: Form SS-4 Third Party Designee section

fields.name: thirdPartyDesigneePhone
fields.label: Third party designee's telephone number
fields.description: Required only when thirdPartyDesigneeName is given. In international E.164 format, e.g. +12025551234.
fields.sourceRef: Form SS-4 Third Party Designee section

fields.name: thirdPartyDesigneeAddressAndZip
fields.label: Third party designee's address and ZIP code
fields.description: Required only when thirdPartyDesigneeName is given.
fields.sourceRef: Form SS-4 Third Party Designee section

fields.name: thirdPartyDesigneeFax
fields.label: Third party designee's fax number
fields.description: In international E.164 format, e.g. +12025551234.
fields.sourceRef: Form SS-4 Third Party Designee section

fields.name: applicantNameAndTitle
fields.label: Name and title of applicant (type or print clearly)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The name and title (e.g. "Sole Proprietor", "Managing Member", "Trustee") of the person signing the application. See the applicantSignature attestation entry in documents[] for the perjury statement they are certifying to.

fields.name: applicantPhone
fields.label: Applicant's telephone number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format, e.g. +12025551234. The IRS online EIN assistant may use this number to contact the applicant about the application.

fields.name: applicantFax
fields.label: Applicant's fax number
fields.description: In international E.164 format, e.g. +12025551234.

steps.title: Business start date, accounting year, and employees
